title: BPE Tokenizer Step by Step
tagline: Watch a tokenizer grow its vocabulary, merge by merge
summary: Type a small corpus, press 'merge', watch the most frequent adjacent pair get glued together. Repeat until the vocabulary reaches your target size. This is exactly how GPT-2, Llama, and Claude build their tokenizers — and how a model ends up with tokens like 'ization', 'tion', or ' the'.
highlights: Type any English corpus, hit 'merge' to see the most frequent pair glued live.
Vocabulary panel grows from letters → subwords → whole words.
Merge history is a log — every rule the tokenizer learned, in order.
Try corpora with morphological structure (running, runner, runs) — watch it find the suffix.
Sprawling caveat: why LLMs still hallucinate the spelling of long words.
